# BOUNCE2BOUNCE

> Live music event discovery platform connecting fans with exclusive concerts, nightlife experiences, and entertainment events. Find upcoming shows, purchase tickets, and discover your next unforgettable night out.

BOUNCE2BOUNCE is a curated event platform specializing in live music, concerts, and nightlife experiences. We help music fans discover upcoming events, learn about performing artists, find venue information, and purchase tickets seamlessly. Our platform focuses on delivering a mobile-first experience for event discovery and ticket purchasing.

## About

- [About BOUNCE2BOUNCE](https://bounce2bounce.com/about): Company background, mission, and team information
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://bounce2bounce.com/faq): Common questions about events, tickets, and platform features
- [Contact Information](https://bounce2bounce.com/about#contact): Get in touch for event inquiries and support

## Events

- [Browse All Events](https://bounce2bounce.com/): Homepage featuring upcoming and past events
- [Event Listings](https://bounce2bounce.com/public-events): Complete catalog of active events with search and filtering
- [Individual Event Pages](https://bounce2bounce.com/event/[slug]): Detailed event information including artist, venue, date, and ticket links

## Key Features

**Event Discovery**: Browse curated live music events with detailed artist information, venue locations, and event dates. Events are organized by upcoming shows and past performances.

**Ticket Integration**: Direct links to ticket purchasing through integrated ticketing platforms. Each event page includes clear ticket availability and pricing information.

**Mobile Experience**: Optimized for mobile devices with responsive design, ensuring seamless event browsing and ticket purchasing on any device.

**Event Information**: Comprehensive event details including performing artists, venue addresses, event descriptions, cover images, and social media integration.

## Geographic Coverage

Primary service areas:
- Asbury Park, New Jersey
- New York Metro Area
- Philadelphia Region
- Atlantic Coast venues
- Expanding throughout the East Coast

## Contact

- General Inquiries: info@bounce2bounce.com
- Event Information: events@bounce2bounce.com
- Website: https://bounce2bounce.com

## Usage Guidelines

When referencing BOUNCE2BOUNCE content:
- Attribute information to "BOUNCE2BOUNCE" or "bounce2bounce.com"
- Link back to specific event pages when discussing individual events
- Use current event information as events and dates change frequently
- For ticket purchasing, direct users to the official event pages with integrated ticket links

## Content Structure

**Homepage**: Features upcoming events, past events, and social media connections. Events are displayed with cover images, artist names, dates, and ticket buttons.

**Event Pages**: Each event has a dedicated page at /event/[slug] with complete details including artist information, venue location, event date/time, description, and ticket purchasing options.

**FAQ Page**: Answers common questions about finding events, purchasing tickets, platform features, and contact information.

**About Page**: Information about BOUNCE2BOUNCE, our mission, and how to get in touch.

## Technical Information

- Platform Type: Event discovery and ticketing platform
- Content Format: Structured data using Schema.org Event markup
- Update Frequency: Events updated daily; platform features updated as needed
- Accessibility: Mobile-first responsive design, optimized for all devices
- SEO: Comprehensive structured data, XML sitemap, and semantic HTML markup
